title: Make Cards and Gallery widgets AND Docs columns shareable through broadcast link
excerpt:

posts.author: Helene_Albert (Hélène Albert)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see this was brought up as a discussion, but no one actually requested it.

In situations where a board answers many needs and only part of the information is pertinent to my client, we onbviously only share a link with them (broadcast).

So can we please make the Gallery/Cards widgets and the Documents column visible in this view.

Inviting my client as a guest is not always the solution; especially if their use of this board is only for consultation (not to collaborate).

At the very minimum, if the images I add to a Docs column were visible to them in the broadcast view, this would be a start!

Thanks!
